subcategory: 3D particle sphere with custom GLSL shaders
use_cases: Hero section background with cosmic visual effect
Portfolio or creative showcase visual element
Interactive ambient background for web applications
ai_summary: A Three.js-based 3D celestial sphere visualization with custom GLSL shaders, particle effects, and mouse-reactive animation. Creates an immersive cosmic atmosphere with configurable hue, speed, zoom, and particle size parameters using fractional Brownian motion and noise functions for organic movement.
